item.title: Demo Series: Intro to Paper Mache & Open Studio
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 6 PM

We’ll start the evening with a paper mache paste making demo, then demonstrate some of our applications for using it to make giant puppets. Demo guests are welcome to stay for the workshop and lend a helping hand to paper mache projects underway or make something of their own.

From Fremont Arts Council
